Scattered neutron spectra were measured at
angles of 45, 90, 135 degrees, with and without sample.
After summing in wide intervals, normalization to
monitor counting and corrections, three spectra of
scattered neutron intensities were approximated by
Legendre polynomials, there sets of parameters
( Legendre coefficients and c-s) were defined; the
